card.name: The Twilight Darkbeast
card.text: You cannot cast spells from your hand or graveyard. When The Twilight Darkbeast enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play lands and cast spells you own from exile and may pay mana as if it were of any color for its cost.

card.name: Entanglement Engine
card.text: When Entanglement Engine enters, exile a card from your hand, put an entanglement counter on it, and draw a card. Spells you cast with names the same as cards exiled with Entanglement Engine cost {1} less to cast. {1}, {T}: Exile a card from your hand, put an entanglement counter on it, and draw a card. {T}: Return a card you own in exile with an entanglement counter on it to your hand.

card.name: Tumultuous Exhibit
card.text: When Tumultuous Exhibit enters, tap it and draw a card. At the beginning of your upkeep, each opponent gains 2 life.

card.name: Backwards Burrowbeast
card.text: Tunneling {2}{G}{G} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) When this creature enters, if its tunneling cost was paid, it fights target creature. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.) This creature fights and deals combat damage with its toughness, rather than its power.

card.name: Phasebound Hunter
card.text: Superposition (Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the toughness of the blocked or blocking creature.)

card.name: Thaxian Phaseblade
Charging Phasebound
card.text: Haste, superposition (Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the toughness of the blocked or blocking creature.) When Charging Phasebound deals combat damage to a player, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Exhibit Keeper
card.text: Entangled — As long as you own a card in exile with an entanglement counter on it, Exhibit Keeper gets +1/+2. {1}{U}, Sacrifice Exhibit Keeper: Counter target instant or sorcery spell unless its controller pays {2} plus {1} for each permanent card you control in exile.

card.name: Lifestation Scout
card.text: Haste Entangled — Lifestation Scout gets +1/+0 for each permanent card you own in exile with an entanglement counter on it. {R}: Exile this card from your hand and put an entanglement counter on it.

card.name: Solar Emulator
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add two mana of any one color. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature you control: Create a Food token. {2}, {T}: Scry 4.

card.name: Darkwurm Hatchling
card.text: Tunneling {G}{G} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) {1}, Sacrifice Darkwurm Hatchling: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Twilightborn Scavenger
card.text: {X}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact you control: Return target artifact from your graveyard to the battlefield. It enters with X charge counters on it.

card.name: Possibility Oracle
card.text: When this creature enters or attacks, you may exile a card from your hand and put an entanglement counter on it. Entangled — At the beginning of your upkeep, scry X then draw a card, where X is the number of cards you own in exile with entanglement counters on them.

card.name: Death of the Dawn
card.text: Destroy each creature and spacecraft. Add X {B} and scry X, where X is the number of permanents destroyed this way.

card.name: Solar Search
card.text: Tunneling {U} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Draw a card and investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Phaselight Colonyship
card.text: Whenever this spacecraft enters or attacks, exile the top card of your library and put an entanglement counter on it.

card.name: Phaselight Engine
card.text: {1}{W}, {T}: Target creature or artifact you control phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: Enclosure Caretaker
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Food token. {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target non-artifact creature you control.

card.name: Darkworld Relic
card.text: Warp {2} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this artifact at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.) When Darkworld Relic enters, choose one — • Search your library for a basic land card, shuffle, then put that card on top. • Look at the top card of target player's library. {1}, Exile this artifact and put an entanglement counter on it: Draw a card.

card.name: Habitat Architect
card.text: Tunneling {W}{W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) At the beginning of your end step, if this creature's tunneling cost was paid this turn, shuffle it into your library. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create X plus one 1/2 white Pangolin creature tokens, where X is the number of cards you own in exile with entanglement counters on them.

card.name: Phaselight Starforge
card.text: {2}, {T}: Create a 3/2 colorless Spacecraft artifact token with station 1+ and flying. (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this permanent. Station only as a sorcery. It becomes a creature at 1+.) {X}{X}, {T}: Put X +1/+1 counters on target Spacecraft you control.

card.name: Legacy of the Phasebound
card.text: Target creature gains superposition and indestructible until end of turn. (Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the toughness of the blocked or blocking creature.)

card.name: Mid-Warp Collision
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Sacrifice a creature. Mid-Warp Collision deals damage equal to that creature's power to any target. • Sacrifice a Spacecraft. Mid-Warp Collision deals damage equal to the number of charge counters on it to any target.

card.name: Phasebound Voidmage
card.text: Superposition (Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the toughness of the blocked or blocking creature.) At the beginning of your end step, if this creature blocked or was blocked this turn, put +1/+1 counters on it equal to its power.

card.name: Thaxian Phasecrasher
card.text: Trample, superposition (Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the toughness of the blocked or blocking creature.)

card.name: Fauna Abductor
card.text: Void — At the beginning of your end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, create a 1/2 white Pangolin creature token.

card.name: Fighter Fabricator
card.text: Whenever an artifact creature you control attacks, target opponent loses 1 life. {6}: Create two 3/2 colorless Spacecraft artifact tokens with station 1+ and flying. The tokens gain haste until end of turn. (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this permanent. Station only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Flora Behemoth
card.text: Tunneling {G}{U} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) When Flora Behemoth enters, draw a card, then put up to one land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. At the beginning of your end step, if Flora Behemoth's tunneling cost was paid this turn, shuffle it into your library.

card.name: Twilight Starsnake
card.text: During your turn and any opponent's main phase, you may cast this spell as if it had flash. Trample When Twilight Starsnake enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Warp {1}{G}{W} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Havoc Render
card.text: Menace Whenever an opponent draws a card, Havoc Render deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Deadworld Archaeologist
card.text: Void — At the beginning of your end step, create a Habitat token if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.") {4}: Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Twilight Starsearcher
card.text: Flying Entangled — This creature gets +1/+1 and has lifelink for each card you own in exile with an entanglement counter on it. Planetcycling {2}{W} ({2}{W}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Planet card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Glimpse of Hope
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the rest back on top in any order. Recur {2}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its recur cost. When this spell resolves or is countered, exile it instead of putting it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Vaserian Apostle
Phasic Barrage
card.text: Destroy target land or artifact. Its controller creates a colorless Wastes basic land token. If a triggered ability would trigger from this land entering the battlefield, it doesn't.

card.name: Ancient Darkwurm
card.text: Tunneling {3}{G}{G} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) When Ancient Darkwurm enters, create two 3/3 green Wurm creature tokens with trample named Darkwurm. At the beginning of your end step, if this creature's tunneling cost was paid, exile it. You may cast for as long as it remains in exile.

card.name: Otherworld Orders
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 black Thax Soldier creature token. Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, the defending player loses 1 life. Warp {B}{R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this enchantment at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Light Tracker
card.text: Flying, superposition (Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the toughness of the blocked or blocking creature.) Whenever a card enters its owner's library from the battlefield, graveyard, or exile, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Enclosed Hydroponics
card.text: Tunneling {G}{W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) When this enchantment enters, create a Habitat token. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Lightborn Agrariator
card.text: {T}: Untap target permanent.

card.name: Escape Pod
card.text: {U}, {T}: The next spell you cast this turn has improvise. (Your artifacts can help cast this spell. Each artifact you tap after you're done activating mana abilities pays for {1}.)

card.name: Hotshot Space Ace
card.text: When Hotshot Space Ace enters, look at the top two cards of your library. You may put them back on top in any order. This creature crews vehicles, saddles mounts, and stations spacecraft as if its power were 2 greater.

card.name: Forward Scout
card.text: Reach, first strike Whenever a card enters exile from the battlefield, create a Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.")

card.name: Otherworld Wurmtamer
card.text: Reach, trample When this creature enters, create a 1/1 black Thax Soldier creature token. If you control a land of each basic land type, instead create a 3/3 green Wurm creature token with trample named Darkwurm. Warp {1}{B} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Clue LSL
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card

card.name: Food LSL
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Spacecraft LSL
card.text: Flying Station 1+ (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this permanent. Station only as a sorcery. It's a creature at 1+.)

card.name: Darkwurm LSL
card.text: Trample

card.name: Static Sequence
card.text: Each player can't cast more than one spell from their hand each turn. Spells can't be cast from graveyards or from exile without entanglement counters on them. {X}{W}{W}: Cast a spell you own in exile with an entanglement counter on it with mana value X without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Allusions to Choice
card.text: When this enchantment enters, scry 2. Whenever you scry or surveil one or more cards, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Rhest Ko, Brutal Subjugator
card.text: Flash Alert — Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent an opponent controls triggers for the first time each turn, create a 1/1 black Thax Soldier creature token. {B}, Sacrifice another creature: You and target opponent each draw a card. That opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Flechette Munitions
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from exile, create a tapped Junk token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.") Whenever you sacrifice an artifact, Flechette Munitions deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Elusive Starsquid
card.text: Tunneling {1}{U} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) When Elusive Starsquid enters, draw two cards, then discard a card. At the beginning of your end step, if this creature's tunneling cost was paid this turn, shuffle it into your library.

card.name: Specimen Savior
card.text: When this creature becomes tapped, put target card from a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library. Warp {3} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this artifact creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Otherworld Vigil
card.text: Tunneling {W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Target creature you control gets +0/+2 and gains vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Breakyard Salvager
card.text: {1}, {T}: Create a tapped Junk token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.") {2}, {T}, Sacrifice a Junk: Create a 3/2 colorless Spacecraft artifact token with station 1+ and flying. (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this permanent. Station only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Veiled Idyll
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land has "{T}: Add one mana of any color." Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional {G}.

card.name: Wurmhole Exploration
card.text: Kicker {2}{G}{G} (You may pay an additional {2}{G}{G} as you cast this spell.) Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of lands you control. Put up to two lands onto the battlefield tapped and/or cast up to two spells with mana value 2 or less from among them without paying their mana costs. If this spell was kicked, put up to two lands and/or cast up to two spells from among them without paying their mana costs instead. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.

card.name: Twilight Darkwurm
card.text: Lifelink Twilight Darkwurm doesn't untap during your untap step. Void — At the beginning of each end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, if this creature isn't a token, create a token that's a copy of Twilight Darkwurm.

card.name: Fate-Linked Twilightborn
card.text: Entangled — This creature can't attack unless you own a card in exile with an entanglement counter on it. During your turn, this creature gets +3/+0. {2}{U}: Exile a card from your hand and put an entanglement counter on it.

card.name: Voracious Cosmipillar
card.text: When this creature enters, choose an opponent. At the beginning of the chosen player's upkeep, sacrifice a creature. Void — At the beginning of your end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, create two 1/1 black Thax Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: Otherworld Assault Team
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • This creature gets +2/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. • Gain control of target creature or artifact until end of turn. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Teeming Lushworld
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control three other Forests and/or Islands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Moonless Plageworld
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control three other Forests and/or Islands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Inclement Brineworld
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control three other Forests and/or Islands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control three other Forests and/or Islands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control three other Forests and/or Islands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control three other Forests and/or Islands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control three other Forests and/or Islands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control three other Forests and/or Islands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Slough Wetworld
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control three other Forests and/or Islands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Torrid Dustworld
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control three other Forests and/or Islands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Wastes LSL
card.text: {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Wildlife Preservator
card.text: Warp {1}{W} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this artifact creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.) When this creature enters, create a 1/2 white Pangolin creature token.

card.name: Retraction Beam
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a spell or permanent you control. Return target spell or nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Draw a card.

card.name: Salvage Equipment
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or artifact. Create two Junk tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Federation Twilightborn
card.text: When this creature leaves, create a tapped Habitat token. When this creature becomes tapped, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. Warp {R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Darkwurm Light-Hunt
card.text: Tunneling {2}{G} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Search your library for up to two basic land or Planet cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped, the other into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Junk LSL
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Thiris Mine
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}: Put two charge counters on target permanent you control.

card.name: Phase Cannon
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a charge counter on this artifact. {T}: Put a charge counter on this artifact. {T}, Remove X charge counters from this artifact: Phase Cannon deals X damage to target creature.

card.name: Lio, Fate Binder
card.text: Haste When Lio enters, exile a nonland card from your hand. Whenever a source you control puts a card, spell, or permanent you own into exile, put an entanglement counter on it. {T}: Copy target spell you own in exile with an entanglement counter on it. You may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Anomolous Study
card.text: Draw seven cards, then put four cards from your hand back on top of your library in any order. Planetcycling {2}{U} ({2}{U}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Planet card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Xenogen Exposure
card.text: Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of basic lands you control.

card.name: Emergency Preparations
card.text: Spacecraft you control become creatures in addition to their other types until end of turn. There is an additional combat phase after this phase. Only Spacecraft can attack during that combat phase. Planetcycling {2}{R} ({2}{R}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Planet card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Vagrant Fruitbearer
card.text: Reach When Vagrant Fruitbearer enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") Planetcycling {2}{G} ({2}{G}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Planet card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Otherworld Veteran
card.text: Tunneling {1}{W}{W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Flash When this creature enters, exile target nonland permanent. Its controller gains life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Fleetwide Engineer
card.text: When Fleetwide Engineer enters, create a 3/2 colorless Spacecraft artifact token with station 1+ and flying. Warp {1}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Exovitalize
card.text: Tunneling {X}{1}{B}{B} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Each player mills three cards. Put up to one creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. Repeat X times.

card.name: Flame-Tongue Feline
card.text: Flying When Flame-Tongue Feline enters, it deals 3 damage to target creature. Warp {1}{R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 3/3 green Wurm creature token with trample named Darkwurm. Warp {2}{G} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. card.name: Weapons Calibrator
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter or charge counter on each of up to two target creatures or spacecraft. Warp {2}{W} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Roving Starsquid
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, scry 2. Warp {U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Writhing Bogbeast
card.text: This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the number of Swamps you control. Menace Planetcycling {2}{B} ({2}{B}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Planet card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Fanatical Rage
card.text: Kicker {R} (You may pay an additional {R} as you cast this spell.) Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains trample until end of turn. If this spell was kicked, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Formicat Scout
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Shara, Luck-Linked
card.text: When Shara enters, exile target card from your graveyard and put an entanglement counter on it. You may cast it from exile on a later turn. Spells you cast from exile cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Fresh Reinforcements
card.text: First strike When this creature enters, return up to one other target permanent you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Suit Puncture
card.text: Target creature gets -3/-0 until end of turn. Draw a card. Recur {2}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its recur cost. When this spell resolves or is countered, exile it instead of putting it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Exoskeletal Puppeteering
card.text: Target creature you control gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control and create a 1/1 black Thax Soldier creature token." Recur {3}{B}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its recur cost. When this spell resolves or is countered, exile it instead of putting it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Chaos Reader
card.text: Entangled — As long as you own a card in exile with an entanglement counter on it, this creature has haste. Whenever Chaos Reader becomes tapped, add {R}. You don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Rocket Punch
card.text: Tunneling {1}{G} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Phaselight Rupture
card.text: Kicker {W}{W} (You may pay an additional {W}{W} as you cast this spell.) When this enchantment enters, if this spell was kicked, each creature loses shroud, ward, and hexproof until end of turn. Then exile target creature an opponent controls with mana value 3 or less until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Destabilize
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}. If that spell wasn't cast from its owner's hand, exile it instead.

card.name: Bloody Exosoldier
card.text: Haste Bloody Exosoldier can't block. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you may return this card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Vaserian Stormstone
card.text: When this artifact enters, you may discard a card. When you do, exile the top three cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn. When this artifact dies, create a 1/1 black Thax Soldier creature token.

card.name: Lightborn Ecologist
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, scry 1.

card.name: Veer Off Course
card.text: Tunneling {2}{U}{U} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Return up to two target nonland permanents to their owners' hands. Draw a card.

card.name: Hypothermic Reaction
card.text: Enchant creature or spacecraft Enchanted creature or spacecraft gets -5/-0 and charge counters can't be placed on it. You may cast this spell from your graveyard for {3}{U}.

card.name: Lone Curse-Linked
card.text: Tunneling {B}{B} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Entangled — At the beginning of your end step, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life for each card you own in exile with an entanglement counter on it.

card.name: Improvised Craftwelder
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you may pay {2}. If you do, create a 3/2 colorless Spacecraft artifact token with station 1+ and flying.

card.name: Deadworld Terraformer
card.text: Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on this creature, you may put a land from your hand onto the battlefield under your control. {2}{G}: Adapt 1. Activate only as a sorcery. (If this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Philanthropic Pathfinder
card.text: When this creature enters, each player creates a Habitat token. If an opponent controls more lands than you, you create a Habitat token instead. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.") Warp {W}

card.name: Quantum Terror
card.text: Warp {U}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.) This spell costs {2} less to cast if there are five or more instant and/or sorcery spells in your graveyard. Whenever you cast an your first or second instant spell, sorcery spell, or spell from exile each turn, draw a card.

card.name: Stray Bombardment
card.text: Destroy target creature with total power and toughness 4 or less or target creature that entered this turn.

card.name: Unstable Stormhound
card.text: Menace When Unstable Stormhound enters, it deals damage to each player equal to the number of nonbasic lands and/or enchanted lands that player controls. This damage cannot be prevented. Warp {1}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Colony Pioneer
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.") When this creature dies, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Otherworld Banishment
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.) • Otherworld Banishment deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. If it would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Twilight Disruption
card.text: Counter target instant, sorcery, or enchantment spell. Recur {2}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its recur cost. When this spell resolves or is countered, exile it instead of putting it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Regenerating Exosoldier
card.text: When Regenerating Exosoldier enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) You may cast this card from your graveyard using its warp ability. Warp—{1}{B}, Pay 1 life (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Last-Second Exchange
card.text: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it until the end of your next turn. Void — Exile the top two cards of your library instead if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn. You may play those cards until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Phaselight Recalibration
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a Spacecraft with one or more charge counters on it. Draw two cards.

card.name: Scrapper's Lightcutter
card.text: Flash When this Equipment enters, attach it to target attacking creature you control. Then, this Equipment deals damage equal to that creature's power to any other target. Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a tapped Treasure token and a tapped Junk token." Equip {4}

card.name: Escape into Oasis
card.text: Tunneling {1}{G}{G} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Return up to one target card from your graveyard to your hand, then up to one target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Behavioral Analyst
card.text: Tunneling {1}{W}{W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) {5}{W}: Create a 1/2 white Pangolin creature token. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, look at the top two cards of your library. You may put them back on top in any order.

card.name: Untangle Fate
card.text: Choose one — • Scry 2. • Exile the top card of your library and put an entanglement counter on it. Entangled — If you own a card in exile with an entanglement counter on it, draw a card.

card.name: Nihilistic Revelation
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland noncreature card from that player's hand. That player exiles that card and loses 2 life.

card.name: Uproarious Sorcerer
card.text: {T}: Add {R}. {4}: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Activate only during your turn.

card.name: Voidmage's Blessing
card.text: Target creature you control gets reach, trample, hexproof, and indestructible until end of turn. Void — As long as a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, put two +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Missing No Longer
card.text: Return target creature card with power 1 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Twilight Stalker
card.text: As long as there are one or more +1/+1 counters on this creature, it has flying. {2}{U}{U}: Adapt 2. This ability costs {2} less to activate if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn. (If this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put two +1/+1 counters on it.)

card.name: Costly Position
card.text: Tunneling {1}{B} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) You draw two cards and you lose 2 life.

card.name: Electrostorm
card.text: Kicker—Remove up to two charge counters from an artifact you control. (You may remove up to two charge counters from an artifact you control in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) Electrostorm deals 2 damage to any target. If this spell was kicked, Electrostorm deals 4 damage to any target instead.

card.name: Yutaran Hunter
card.text: Tunneling {6}{G} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the number of basic land types among lands you control.

card.name: Augur's Assistant
card.text: {T}: Add {W}. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells with mana value 2 or less or to cast spells from exile.

card.name: Lightborn Ace
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, scry 1. This creature crews vehicles, stations spacecraft, and stations planets as if its power were 2 greater.

card.name: Vaserian Chanter
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life. Void — At the beginning of your end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Hotshot Aeronaut
card.text: This first time this creature becomes tapped each turn, untap it. It gains +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Aggressive Phasewurm
card.text: Superposition (Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the toughness of the blocked or blocking creature.) Void — At the beginning of combat of combat on your turn, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, scry 1.

card.name: Rapidfire Lightcutter
Soarnith Commando
card.text: Flying Whenever Soarnith Commando deals damage to an opponent, draw a card.

card.name: Solitary Captain
card.text: When Solitary Captain dies, create a Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.")

card.name: Curation Envoy
card.text: Whenever you exile one or more cards, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Relicworld Colonization
card.text: Up to one target creature you control explores. Create a Habitat token. (To explore, reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard. A Habitat token is an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.")

card.name: Reverse Engineering
card.text: Whenever you draw a card, put a charge counter on this enchantment. Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, if there are three or more charge counters on this enchantment, create a 3/2 colorless Spacecraft artifact token with station 1+ and flying. If there are six or more charge counters on this enchantment, it enters with a charge counter on it.

card.name: Exoskeletal Operator
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice another creature or artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. When this creature dies, return up to two target creature cards with lesser power from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Quantum Sightstone
card.text: Entangled — As long as you own a card in exile with an entanglement counter on it, whenever you cast a spell, Quantum Sightstone deals 1 damage to each opponent. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice a nontoken creature you control: Exile the top card of your library and put an entanglement counter on it. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Domebound Ecologist
card.text: When Domebound Ecologist enters, create a Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.") Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Entanglement Engineer
card.text: Entangled — As long as you own a card in exile with an entanglement counter on it, instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. {2}{U}, {T}: Exile a card from your hand and put an entanglement counter on it. Then draw a card.

card.name: Xenogenic Bloodghoul
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. {1}{B}, Exile this creature from your graveyard: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Targeted Termination
card.text: Choose a number. Targeted Termination deals 3 damage to each creature with mana value, power, or toughness equal to that number and exiles each artifact with that mana value.

card.name: Armorback Specimen
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature becomes tapped, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Waste Recycler
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature becomes tapped, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. As long as you own seven or more cards in exile, create a Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.")

card.name: Lost Cargo
card.text: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) When this artifact enters, scry 2. {4}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target nonland permanent. Its controller creates a 1/1 blue Squid creature token with flying named Starsquid.

card.name: Microstar Generator
card.text: {1}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once each turn. {6}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card for each color of mana spent to activate this ability.

card.name: Deadworld Precolonizer
card.text: When this creature enters, each player creates a tapped Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.")

card.name: Deadworld Dome
card.text: When Deadworld Dome enters, scry 1, then draw a card. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — • Create a Wastes basic land token. (It's a colorless land with "{T}: Add {C}.") • Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.

card.name: Dyson Colossus
card.text: Sunburst, sunburst (This enters with two +1/+1 counter on it for each color of mana spent to cast it.) You may spend mana to cast spells as though it were mana of any color. As long as there are at least three +1/+1 counters on this artifact, it is a creature in addition to its other types.

card.name: Darkworld Monument
card.text: Whenever a spell you control is warped, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn — • Create a Treasure token. • Each opponent loses 2 life. • Scry 2.

card.name: Fleetwide Repairbot
card.text: When this creature becomes tapped, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target Spacecraft you control. Warp {3} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this artifact creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Habitat LSL
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — • Create a Wastes basic land token. (It's a colorless land with "{T}: Add {C}.") • Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.

card.name: Lae Sard, Baron of the Stars
card.text: Artifact creatures you control have haste. Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, triggered abilities you control can't exile up to one target permanent you control until end of turn.

card.name: Voya, Fate-Linked Savior
card.text: When Voya enters, choose {U}, {R}, or {W}. Spells you cast cost that much less to cast. Whenever you cast a spell from your hand or graveyard, instead exile it and put an entanglement counter on it. Then cast another spell you own in exile with an entanglement counter on it.

card.name: Resource Raid
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, you draw a card and lose 1 life. {5}{B}: Put a lifelink counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Swarmlaunch Carrier
card.text: If one or more artifact tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus an additional 3/2 colorless Spacecraft artifact token with station 1+ and flying are created instead. (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this permanent. Station only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Stereoscopic Tactician
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Stereoscopic Tactician becomes tapped, scry 1 and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Dire Departure
card.text: Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library. Scry 1.

card.name: Summoned Cosmipede
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature becomes tapped, target creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn. Warp {1}{B} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Soarnith Squaddie
card.text: Flying, haste Warp {R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Soilless Tiller
card.text: Tap an untapped noncreature permanent you control: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Re-Energize
card.text: Choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. • Put a charge counter on target Spacecraft or Planet you control. Draw a card.

card.name: Crashed Transport
card.text: Flash When Crashed Transport enters, target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Phaseshred
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card you've drawn and/or each card from your library you've looked at this turn. Exile target creature or spacecraft.

card.name: Gravitic Crush
card.text: For each opponent, destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying that player controls.

card.name: Last Ditch Maneuver
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. If it's not your turn, untap it.

card.name: Plans For Development
card.text: Tunneling {2}{U} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Draw cards equal to the amount of mana spent to cast this spell, then discard a card. Tap up to one target untapped creature.

card.name: Manufactured Incident

card.name: Orbital Shocktroop
card.text: Trample When Orbital Shocktroop enters, target opponent loses 2 life. Void — At the beginning of your end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Roving Barkcrusher

card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card. When this creature dies, scry 1.

card.name: Force Multiplier

card.name: Colony Surveyor
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, it explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Orbital Droptroop
card.text: Tunneling {4}{B} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) As long as you control an artifact, this creature gets +1/+0 and has menace. card.name: Overthrow Defenders

Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.") • Overthrow Defenders deals 3 damage to that creature's controller.

card.name: Mycellic Crasher
card.text: Tunneling {3}{G}{G} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Trample Whenever a land or token you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Stranded Adrift
card.text: Enchant creature or spacecraft When this Aura enters, tap enchanted permanent. Enchanted permanent doesn't untap during its controller's untap step. Counters cannot be put on enchanted permanent.

card.name: Archpriest of Twilight
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you may sacrifice another creature or artifact. If you do, draw a card and each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Stampeding Sergeant
card.text: Superposition (Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the toughness of the blocked or blocking creature.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, up to one target creature that entered this turn gains haste.

card.name: Geoengineer's Multitool
Soul Archivist
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life. If it was cast from anywhere other than your hand, draw a card if you haven't drawn a card from this ability this turn.

card.name: Scrap Engineer
card.text: The first time you sacrifice an artifact during each of your turns, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.) Activated abilities of artifacts you control cost {1} less to activate.

card.name: Otherworldly Advantage
card.text: When this enchantment enters, each opponent sacrifices a nontoken creature. Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may pay 4 life. When you do, return target creature or Spacecraft card with mana value 5 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Station Raider
card.text: Menace Whenever Station Raider deals combat damage to an opponent, create a Habitat token. Whenever you sacrifice an artifact, Station Raider deals 2 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Rhosha, Time's Prisoner
card.text: If a spell you own would be cast from anywhere other than your hand, instead exile it with an additional entanglement counter on it and create a copy of that spell. You may cast the copy without paying its mana cost. You may cast spells you own from exile with entanglement counters on them. Spells you cast cost {2} more to cast for each entanglement counter on them.

card.name: Prisonworld's Sentence
card.text: Enchant land you control When this Aura enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls with mana value 2 or less until this Aura leaves the battlefield. Enchanted land gains "{T}: Add {W}" and has ward {1}. (Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.)

card.name: Federation Advisor
card.text: During your turn and any opponent's main phase, you may cast this spell as if it had flash. When this creature enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) Whenever you scry or surveil one or more cards, draw a card. Warp {1}{U}

card.name: Thaxian Voidstone
Unak, Exo Manipulator
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice a creature, choose one — • Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield and create a tapped copy of it. They each are a Zombie in addition to their other types and gain menace and lose all other abilities. Activate only as a sorcery. • Look at the top four cards of your library. Put up to one card from among them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Jaster, Zionnoth's Second
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from exile, add {R}. If you would lose unspent mana, that mana becomes red instead. {6}: Create a 1/1 black Thax Soldier creature token and a 3/2 colorless Spacecraft artifact token with station 1+ and flying.

card.name: Chaotic Clamor
card.text: You may cast spells from exile without paying their mana costs. Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Kai'Kellon, Fragmented Forebear
card.text: Creature and sorcery spells you control and creature and sorcery cards you own that aren't on the battlefield have tunneling, where the tunneling cost is that card's mana cost. During your turn, spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {2} less to cast.

card.name: Wurmtaming
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, create a 3/3 green Wurm creature token with trample named Darkwurm.

card.name: Tactical Communicator
card.text: Tunneling {1}{W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) When this creature enters, look at the top six cards of you library. You may reveal a Spacecraft card or creature card with mana value 3 or less from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Ancient Starsquid

card.name: Catalytic Processor

Whenever you cast a spell, if mana from an artifact token was spent to cast it, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast that spell without paying its mana cost. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Active Shielding
card.text: Target artifact or creature you control gains protection from the color of your choice or colorless until end of turn. Void — As long as a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, scry 1.

card.name: Wurmtamer's Stone
card.text: {T}: Draw a card. Put a card from your hand on top of your library. Void — At the beginning of your end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Planet Settler
card.text: When this creature enters, if an opponent controls more lands than you, create a Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.") Warp {W}

card.name: Escort Oracle
card.text: Flash Tunneling {1}{U} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) When this creature enters, target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Artificial Ace
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, create a 3/2 colorless Spacecraft artifact token with station 1+ and flying. {B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a charge counter on target permanent you control.

card.name: Thrashing Cragwolf
card.text: Menace Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, scry 1. Then, you may reveal the top card of your library. When you do, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is that card's mana value.

card.name: Mycellic Propagator
card.text: Tokens you control have "Whenever this permanent becomes tapped, target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn." If one or more tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus an additional Food token are created instead.

card.name: Phasebound Duelist
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Star Ward
card.text: Counter target spell. If it wasn't cast from its owner's hand, exile it instead. Then draw a card.

card.name: Overwhelming Loss
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each life your opponents have lost this turn. Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. If this spell was kicked, that player loses 3 life.

card.name: Reactive Magnetoad
card.text: Tunneling {1}{R} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Whenever another creature or artifact you control enters, Reactive Magnetoad deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Harmonic Darkwurm
card.text: Trample {4}{G}{G}: Adapt 3. Draw three cards. (If this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put three +1/+1 counters on it.) Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on this creature, creatures you control gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Territory Pillager
card.text: Double strike Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Collection Compiler
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, scry 1. This creature's power is equal to the number of cards in your hand.

card.name: Ravenous Cosmipede
card.text: Tunneling {2}{B}{B} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its tunneling cost.) Menace When this creature enters, destroy up to one other target creature.

card.name: Yutaran Vigor
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, enchanted creature fights up to one target creature an opponent controls. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.) Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has trample.

card.name: Mechanized Croptender
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a basic Plains card or up to two creature cards with total mana value 2 or less, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control.

card.name: Practiced Replicaster
card.text: When Practiced Replicaster enters, you may cast target instant or sorcery card with mana value 4 or less from your graveyard without paying its mana cost. If that spell would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead. Warp {2}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Thiris Crystal
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from exile, Thiris Crystal deals 1 damage to target opponent. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice another artifact: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it until end of turn.

card.name: Zionnoth, Planet Conquerer
card.text: Flying, first strike, trample Whenever Zionnoth deals combat damage to a player, choose one — • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • Discard a card, then draw two cards. • Remove up to two counters from a land or artifact an opponent controls. Put that many counters on a land or artifact you control. • Create a Habitat token.

card.name: Starsquid LSL
card.text: Flying

card.name: Terrestrial Scouter
card.text: Flying {8}, Sacrifice this creature: You draw three cards and gain 3 life. This ability costs {X} less to activate, where X is the number of basic land types among lands you control.
